term: Comes Out Okay on the Other Side
pronunciation: /kʌmz aʊt əˈkeɪ ɑn ði ˈʌðər saɪd/
englishDefinitions: Used to say that someone survives a difficult experience and ends up all right.
persianTranslation: از آن‌ورِ ماجرا سالم بیرون آمدن
از بحران جان سالم به در بردن
examples: It was a terrible year, but she comes out okay on the other side.
If you stay patient, you’ll probably come out okay on the other side.
Many students struggle at first, but they come out okay on the other side.
